GIANT_SLAYER_HOOK.name: GIANT SLAYER HOOK
description: Use your Grappling Hook to pull yourself towards large enemies during combat.

GROUNDING_HOOK.name: GROUNDING HOOK
description: Use your Grappling Hook to pull flying enemies towards you during combat.

SAVIOUR.name: SAVIOUR
description: You only need 3 instead of 6 seconds to revive an ally.

BACKSTAB_DAMAGE.name: BACKSTAB DAMAGE
description: Increase the damage you deal from behind by 25%.

OPPORTUNITY.name: OPPORTUNITY
description: Increases the Multiplier of the Merciless Attack and the Sneak Attack by 100%.

MINER.name: MINER
description: When you mine resources, you have a 10% chance to get one additional resource.

LUMBERJACK.name: LUMBERJACK
description: Felling axes do 30% more damage against wooden objects including trees.

QUALITY_GEAR.name: QUALITY GEAR
description: All tools lose durability 50% slower.

MASON.name: MASON
description: The Pickaxe deals 30% more damage against stone objects, including resource veins.

FISHERMANS_RESOLVE.name: FISHERMAN'S RESOLVE
description: Increases your Fishing Endurance by 30%.
Allows for extended battles with hooked fish.

POWER_PARRY.name: POWER PARRY
description: Increases the enemy's stun bar gain on parry attacks.

ATTR_SPIRIT.name: SPIRIT
description: Increases your Spirit attribute by 1
Increases Mana by 20 per Attribute Point

ATTR_INT.name: INTELLIGENCE
description: Increases your Intelligence attribute by 1
Increases Magic damage by 5% per Attribute Point

ATTR_CONS.name: CONSTITUTION
description: Increases your Constitution attribute by 1
Increases Health by 50 per Attribute Point

ATTR_STR.name: STRENGTH
description: Increases your Strength attribute by 1
Increases Melee damage by 5% per Attribute Point

ATTR_ENDURANCE.name: ENDURANCE
description: Increases your Endurance attribute by 1
Increases Stamina by 10 per Attribute Point

ATTR_DEX.name: DEXTERITY
description: Increases your Dexterity attribute by 1
Increases Bow and Dagger damage by 5% per Attribute Point

WELL_RESTED.name: WELL RESTED
description: The base duration for the Rested buff is increased by 5 Minutes.
Increase the Comfort in your home to further increase the duration.

SNEAK_ATTACK.name: SNEAK ATTACK
description: The Sneak Attack deals massive 10x damage to unaware enemies.

UPDRAFT.name: UPDRAFT
description: Pressing the jump button while gliding will give you a small height boost. This skill can be used once per flight. Cost: 120 mana

BEGONE.name: BEGONE
description: A magic-powered punch that pushes and stuns hit foes.
Replaces your unarmed attacks as long as you have the necessary mana available: 30 Mana

RADIANT_AURA.name: RADIANT AURA
description: All Fell foes within 10 meters take 1 fire damage per intelligence per second.

WATER_AURA.name: WATER AURA
description: You emit a healing aura. It heals all injured allies within 15 meters. The healing scales with your intelligence attribute (1 health for every 2 points of intelligence).

MARTYR.name: MARTYR
description: When you are killed by an enemy, all allies within 50 meters will heal 30% of their maximum health.

DIVINE_SURGE.name: DIVINE SURGE
description: Healing spells can perform Critical Strikes that scale with your Critical Strike Damage.

RIGHTEOUS_FIRE.name: RIGHTEOUS FIRE
description: Healing any target with a spell triggers a burst of fire that deals 50% of the heal amount as Fire damage to nearby Fell enemies.

BLINK.name: BLINK
description: Replaces the Dodge Roll ability with a short range teleport.

EARTH_AURA.name: EARTH AURA
description: Shields allies and yourself, reducing incoming damage by 10%

NEMESIS.name: NEMESIS
description: Whenever an ally draws the attention of an enemy, you draw it in equal measures.

SHOCKWAVE.name: SHOCKWAVE
description: Trigger a shockwave when you parry an attack or overpower an enemy.
The shockwave pushes back nearby enemies. It also increases their stun bar, scaling with your strength attribute.

Overpower
To overpower an enemy, fill their stun bar by attacking while they block or by parrying their attacks.

HEAVY_SPECIALIZATION.name: HEAVY SPECIALIZATION
description: Allows you to attack faster with Two-Handed weapons.

BASH.name: BASH
description: Your parry bashes the enemy for 20 blunt damage. The damage is increased by your strength attribute.

WHIRLWIND_CRESCENDO.name: WHIRLWIND CRESCENDO
description: When equipped with a Two-Handed weapon, trigger a whirl attack at the end of an attack chain.
Cost: 75 Stamina

CRASH_DOWN_ATTACK.name: CRASH DOWN ATTACK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon, you can perform a jump attack during the descent of your jump.
Crash Down deals 50% more weapon damage in a small blast radius and costs Stamina according to the weapon's weight.
Cost: 35-60 Stamina

Block Breaker
This special attack fills a blocking enemy's Stun Bar twice as much when hit.

DOUBLE_JUMP.name: DOUBLE JUMP
description: Allows jumping a second time while airborne.

DESSERT_STOMACH.name: DESSERT STOMACH
description: You gain one additional food slot

LAST_MEAL.name: LAST MEAL
description: Your Food buffs persist through death, but they last half as long.

EAGLE_EYE.name: EAGLE EYE
description: Greatly increases the zoom while aiming with a bow.

MULTI_SHOT.name: MULTI SHOT
description: When using regular arrows there is a 20% chance to spawn a flurry of arrows that spread slightly.
This will cost additional arrows, but will not trigger on special arrows.

MULTI_SHOT_SPREAD.name: MULTI SHOT SPREAD
description: Adds a 25% chance to spawn an additional projectile to your "flurry of arrows" from the "Multi Shot" skill.
This additional projectile does not subtract from your stack of ammunition.

MULTI_SHOT_TRIGGER.name: MULTI SHOT TRIGGER
description: ALL arrows, including special arrows, can trigger "Multi Shot".
The special Multi Shot projectiles will subtract from your stack of ammunition.

BEE_STING.name: BEE STING
description: When you draw your bow while in the air, your fall is slowed down for a short time. Every shot gives you a small push to get more air time.
Cost: 10 stamina per second

SHELL_SHOCK.name: SHELL SHOCK
description: Infuse your ranged explosives with mana. They now stun enemies for up to 1 second.
Mana Cost: 5 per stunned enemy

COUNTERSTRIKE.name: COUNTERSTRIKE
description: After receiving damage there is a 20% chance to reflect 50% of the damage back to the attacker as fire damage.
This magical attack can trigger other skills.

TERROR.name: TERROR
description: On a critical hit with a spell, the target will be stunned for 4 seconds.

SHOCK_RESISTANCE.name: SHOCK RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Shock Resistance by 5% which reduces the amount of Shock damage received.

QUICK_CHARGE.name: QUICK CHARGE
description: Reduces the time Staffs require to charge-up a spell by 50%.

THIS_IS_THE_WAY.name: THIS IS THE WAY
description: When attacking with a magical weapon all damage is increased by 10%.

ARSONIST.name: ARSONIST
description: All fire damage is increased by an additional 10%.

PYROMANIAC.name: PYROMANIAC
description: All fire damage is increased by an additional 20%.

SUN_AURA.name: SUN AURA
description: All Fell foes within 10 meters take 1 additional fire damage per intelligence per second.

FIRE_RESISTANCE.name: FIRE RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Fire Resistance by 5% which reduces the amount of Fire damage received.

THUNDER.name: THUNDER
description: All shock damage is increased by an additional 10%.

LIGHTNING.name: LIGHTNING
description: All shock damage is increased by an additional 20%.

ICEMAN.name: ICEMAN
description: All ice damage is increased by an additional 10%.

SUBZERO.name: SUBZERO
description: All ice damage is increased by an additional 20%.

FROST.name: FROST
description: When receiving melee damage, the attacker will be slowed down for 3 seconds.

ICE_RESISTANCE.name: ICE RESISTANCE
description: Increases your Ice Resistance by 5% which reduces the amount of Ice damage received.

WIZARD.name: WIZARD
description: When attacking with a magical weapon your critical hit chance is increased by 10%

DARK_ARTS.name: DARK ARTS
description: All Shrouded damage is increased by an additional 10%.

ABYSS.name: ABYSS
description: All Shrouded damage is increased by an additional 20%.

CHAIN_HIT.name: CHAIN HIT
description: On a critical hit with a magical weapon, the attack will automatically hit a second enemy within 15 meters for 5 Shock damage per intelligence.

MASS_DESTRUCTION.name: MASS DESTRUCTION
description: A critical attack with a magic weapon will hit all enemies within 20 meters of the target for 2 Shock damage per intelligence.

NECROMANCER.name: NECROMANCER
description: When killing an enemy with a magic weapon, you have a 10% chance to summon a friendly skull companion.

HEALER.name: HEALER
description: Health gain from healing spells will be increased by 10%.

HEALER_II.name: HEALER II
description: Health gain from healing spells will be increased by 20%

HEALING_REVIVE.name: HEALING REVIVE
description: Revived players will heal 25% of their health instead of 10%.

SHROUD_FILTER.name: SHROUD FILTER
description: Dealing magic weapon damage has a 15% chance to trigger a small flame burst that restores 30 seconds of Shroud Time to you and your allies within 20 meters.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

WATERS_OF_LIFE.name: WATERS OF LIFE
description: Increases Water Aura healing to 2 Health per 2 points of Intelligence.

SHROUD_RESISTANCE.name: SHROUD RESISTANCE
description: Increases Shroud Resistance by 5% which reduces the amount of Shroud damage received.

SHROUD_MISTERY.name: SHROUD MYSTERY
description: When you receive Shroud damage, all players within 20-meters receive 15% increased Shroud Resistance for 30 seconds.

EMERGENCY_BLINK.name: EMERGENCY BLINK
description: You can blink while being stunned. This will break the stunned state.

BLINK_ATTACK.name: BLINK ATTACK
description: Blinking into an enemy triggers an explosion which deals fire damage in a small range.
Damage and mana cost scale with the intelligence attribute.

ARCANE_DEFLECTION.name: ARCANE DEFLECTION
description: On a successful parry, gain 20 mana.

UNITY.name: UNITY
description: Damaging enemies with wands has a 24% chance to recover 4% mana.

WAND_MASTER.name: WAND MASTER
description: Attacking with a wand has a 30% chance to spawn an additional wand projectile that deals 50% damage.

ETERNAL_SPARK.name: ETERNAL SPARK
description: Wand projectiles have a 25% chance not to consume durability.

STING.name: STING
description: Repeated wand damage is increased by 20%.

BATTLE_HEAL.name: BATTLE HEAL
description: When dealing critical damage with a melee weapon, you will heal 5% of your maximum health.

BLOODLETTING.name: BLOODLETTING
description: When scoring a critical hit with a magical weapon, there is a 50% chance to spawn 2 health, mana, and/or stamina Orbs.
Gathering the Orb replenishes 10% of the respective resource.

LIFE_BURST.name: LIFE BURST
description: When killing an enemy with a magic weapon all players within 15 meters of the target gain health equal to 3 times your Intelligence.

BLOOD_MAGIC.name: BLOOD MAGIC
description: When your mana drops below 20%, you restore 35% of your max mana at the cost of 1 health per mana. This will stop at 1 health.

Cooldown
This takes 2 minutes before it can trigger again.

ABSORB.name: ABSORB
description: When you suffer magical damage, you have a 10% chance to generate 1 mana for each health point lost.

SNAP.name: SNAP
description: Restores 10% mana when triggering the Merciless Attack.

SOUL_LEECH.name: SOUL LEECH
description: When killing an enemy with a melee weapon all players within 15 meters of the target gain 20 mana.

SHINY_PLATES.name: SHINY PLATES
description: Physical armor gains 10% more armor points.

HEAVY_PLATES.name: HEAVY PLATES
description: The maximum amount of physical damage your armor is able to mitigate is increased by 10%

WARDEN.name: WARDEN
description: When there are three or more enemies within 20 meters you suffer 15% less magical damage.

TOWER.name: TOWER
description: When there are three or more enemies within 20 meters you suffer 10% less physical damage.

ARCH_NEMESIS.name: ARCH NEMESIS
description: Whenever an ally draws the attention of an enemy, you draw twice as much.

PURIFICATION.name: PURIFICATION
description: After defeating a Shroud infested foe with a melee weapon you replenish +5 seconds of Shroud Time.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

WARRIOR_PATH.name: THE WARRIOR'S PATH
description: When attacking with a melee weapon all damage is increased by 10%.

THRUST.name: THRUST
description: All melee piercing damage is increased by an additional 10%.

PIERCE.name: PIERCE
description: All melee piercing damage is increased by an additional 20%.

BRUTE.name: BRUTE
description: All melee blunt damage is increased by an additional 10%.

HAMMER_TIME.name: HAMMER TIME
description: All melee blunt damage is increased by an additional 20%.

SLASHER.name: SLASHER
description: All melee cutting damage is increased by an additional 10%.

BUTCHER.name: BUTCHER
description: All melee cutting damage is increased by an additional 20%.

VETERAN.name: VETERAN
description: When attacking with a melee weapon your critical hit chance is increased by 10%.

TITAN_EDGE.name: TITAN EDGE
description: Greatswords damage is increased by 10%.

SWIFT_BLADES.name: SWIFT BLADES
description: Allows you to attack faster with one-handed swords and axes.

FEAST.name: FEAST
description: Meat now increases health by an additional 15%.

HEAVY_HANDED.name: HEAVY HANDED
description: An enemy's stun bar is increased by an additional 20% when attacking into their block with a melee weapon.

STEADFAST.name: STEADFAST
description: Defeating an enemy with a melee weapon restores 1 durability to that weapon.

UPWARDS_SLASH_ATTACK.name: UPWARDS SLASH ATTACK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon, launch a powerful upward strike during the ascent of your jump.
Use this skill to rapidly close the distance on flying enemies.
Cost: 25 Stamina

BREACH.name: BREACH
description: An overpowered enemy suffers 100% more melee damage for 3 seconds.

Overpower
To overpower an enemy, fill their stun bar by attacking while they block or by parrying their attacks.

RELENTLESS.name: RELENTLESS
description: Dealing critical damage with a two-handed weapon increases your critical chance by another 10% for the next hit.

BARBARIAN.name: BARBARIAN
description: You will gain one strength level for every two levels of the Flame.

BLOOD_RAGE.name: BLOOD RAGE
description: When an enemy is killed within 10 meters with a melee weapon, the damage done with melee weapons is increased by 20% for 10 seconds.

VIGOROUS_DEFLECTION.name: VIGOROUS DEFLECTION
description: You gain 30 stamina when you parry an enemy's attack.

BLOOD_WARRIOR.name: BLOOD WARRIOR
description: Spawn a health orb after defeating an enemy with a Sneak Attack or Merciless Attack.
Gathering the orbs replenishes 10% of your health.

WET_DOG.name: WET DOG
description: Weakens the effect of the Wet and Soaked debuffs.
Stamina and Stamina Regeneration are reduced by 20% instead of 30%.

Wet
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 15 minutes. Warmth reduces the remaining duration.

Soaked
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 30 seconds. Also reduces Ice and Shock Resistances by 30% but increases Fire Resistances by 30%.
Soaked can be applied to enemies.
Soaked duration can not be reduced by warmth and Wet debuff starts after it is over.

SOAKED_DOG.name: SOAKED DOG
description: Weakens the effect of the Wet and Soaked debuffs.
Stamina and Stamina Regeneration are reduced by 10% instead of 20%.

Wet
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 15 minutes. Warmth reduces the remaining duration.

Soaked
Reduces Stamina and Stamina Regeneration by 30% for 30 seconds. Also reduces Ice and Shock Resistances by 30% but increases Fire Resistances by 30%.
Soaked can be applied to enemies.
Soaked duration can not be reduced by warmth and Wet debuff starts after it is over.

SPLASH_DASH.name: SPLASH DASH
description: Allows you to perform an evasive dash while swimming or diving.
Cost: 80 Stamina

FINESSE.name: FINESSE
description: One-handed melee weapons and daggers have a 20% chance not to lose durability.

JUMP_ATTACK_II.name: CRASH DOWN: FORCE
description: When attacking from a double jump, Crash Down deals 20% more weapon damage.

BACKSTAB_MASTERY.name: BACKSTAB MASTERY
description: All damage done from the back is increased by 30%.

RUNNER.name: RUNNER
description: Sprinting speed increased by 10% and stamina consumption decreased by 10%

WANDERLUST.name: WANDERLUST
description: Stamina consumption for sprinting on dirt roads is reduced from 90% to 80%. Stamina consumption for sprinting on stone roads is reduced from 75% to 50%.

GOOD_METABOLISM.name: GOOD METABOLISM
description: Health, mana, and stamina Orbs restore 30% instead of 10% of their respective resource.
Mana and Health Potions restore 20% more.

SWIFTSHOT_SUSTENANCE.name: SWIFTSHOT SUSTENANCE
description: 30% chance to spawn a stamina orb when defeating an enemy with a bow.

SWEET_TOOTH.name: SWEET TOOTH
description: The stamina regeneration of sweets is increased by 50%

ARACHNOID.name: ARACHNOID
description: Stamina consumption while climbing is reduced by 50%

REBOUND.name: REBOUND
description: Increase base stamina regeneration by 50%

REBOUND_II.name: REBOUND
description: Increase base stamina regeneration by 50%

INNER_FIRES.name: INNER FIRES
description: Maximum Shroud Time increased by 2 minutes, allowing you to explore for longer.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

RELENTLESS_FLAME.name: RELENTLESS FLAME
description: Maximum Shroud Time increased by 5 minutes, allowing you to explore for longer.

Shroud Time
Should this time run out, the Shroud will consume you.

SNAKE_EATER.name: SNAKE EATER
description: Increases your poison resistance which reduces the damage received from poison by 20%.

MITHRIDATIST.name: MITHRIDATIST
description: Your poison resistance is increased by an additional 10%.
You also gain a 25% chance to avoid being poisoned.

DAGGER_MASTER.name: DAGGER MASTER
description: Increases damage dealt with daggers by 15%.

SLICE_AND_DICE.name: SLICE AND DICE
description: Increases the damage of your next bow attack by 50% after a dagger crit.

VUKAH_LANGUAGE.name: VUKAH LANGUAGE
description: Vukah within 50 meters will no longer attack you unless provoked.

CALM_SPIRIT.name: CALM SPIRIT
description: Wild animals within 50 meters will be pacified unless attacked. Does not affect animals corrupted by the Shroud.

BEAST_MASTER.name: BEAST MASTER
description: When you are targeted by an attack, wild animals within 50 meters will attack the enemy.

VUKAH_CULTURE.name: VUKAH CULTURE
description: When you are targeted by an attack, Vukah within 50 meters will attack the enemy.

ENDURANCE_OF_THE_FLAME.name: ENDURANCE OF THE FLAME
description: You will gain one endurance for every two levels of the Flame.

MARKSMAN.name: MARKSMAN
description: All damage dealt with ranged weapons is increased by 10%

SHARPSHOOTER.name: SHARPSHOOTER
description: All ranged damage is increased by an additional 20%

COUNTER_BATTERY.name: COUNTER BATTERY
description: +15% damage to ranged enemies.

EAGLES_BANE.name: EAGLES BANE
description: Damage against flying enemies increased by 30%.

SKILL_SHOT.name: SKILL SHOT
description: All damage dealt to an enemy's head is increased by 20%.

RANGER.name: RANGER
description:
+2 Endurance
+2 Dexterity
+5 Stamina Recharge
+5% Critical Chance
+5% Critical Damage

SILENT_STRIDE.name: SILENT STRIDE
description: Increases your movement speed while sneaking.

KICK.name: KICK
description: When equipped with a Melee weapon you can perform a Kick by attacking while blocking.
Kick deals little damage but hits the target with massive force to fill up the enemies Stun Bar and pushes them back.
Stun Bar increase scales with Dexterity. Stun time depends on the enemy's size.

Overpower
Attacking blocking enemies or parrying their attacks fills their Stun Bar until they become overpowered.
Overpowered enemies are open for Merciless Attacks.

AIRBORNE.name: AIRBORNE
description: Gliders consume 30% less stamina

SNIPER.name: SNIPER
description: When attacking with a ranged weapon your critical hit chance is increased by 10%.

VITALITY_SURGE.name: VITALITY SURGE
description: Dealing a critical strike with a ranged weapon restores 5 stamina.

BLESSED_ARROWS.name: BLESSED ARROWS
description: When scoring a critical hit with a bow, you will regenerate 20 mana.

BOUNTY_BONANZA.name: BOUNTY BONANZA
description: After defeating a Fell enemy with a headshot your group gains an additional 5 Experience Points.

RICOCHETS.name: RICOCHETS
description: For every target you hit with an Exploding Arrow, its damage is increased by 1%.

GRACEFUL_STRIDE.name: GRACEFUL STRIDE
description: You will gain one dexterity for every two levels of the Flame.

CHAIN_REACTION.name: CHAIN REACTION
description: Every enemy hit with an Exploding Arrow has a 20% chance to trigger a secondary explosion for 50% damage in a small radius.

ARCANE_CONCENTRATION.name: ARCANE CONCENTRATION
description: You will gain one spirit for every two levels of the Flame.

EXALTED.name: EXALTED
description: You will gain one intelligence for every two levels of the Flame.

THICK_SKIN.name: THICK SKIN
description: You will gain one constitution for each two levels of the Flame.

LIFE_ESSENCES.name: LIFE ESSENCES
description: Your maximum health is increased fivehold by your intelligence attribute.

POISONED_BLADES.name: POISONED BLADES
description: Increases the chance to poison enemies to 25% when using daggers with the Poisoned Blades perk.

POISON_MASTERY.name: POISON MASTERY
description: Increases the damage dealt with the Poisoned Blades dagger perk by 100%.

QUICK_REFLEX_BLOCK.name: QUICK REFLEX BLOCK
description: Briefly enhances your block value when blocking with the dual daggers, ensuring a near-miss parry reduces stamina minimally.

EXPOSE_WEAKNESS.name: EXPOSE WEAKNESS
description: Critical Strikes with Daggers increase damage dealt to the enemy by 25% for 3 seconds.
